title: Algerian Frittata
description: A traditional Algerian-inspired frittata recipe made with eggs and inviting spices.
instructions: Whisk the eggs, Algerian spice, and inviting spice in a bowl.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the egg mixture to the skillet and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Slide the frittata out of the skillet onto a plate and serve hot.
Cut the frittata into wedges and serve with your favorite sides.
